features: Delicate Snowflake Design: Elevate your holiday decor with this exquisite Christmas hanging paper fan, decorated with intricate snowflake patterns that capture the magic and spirit of the season. Bring a cozy touch to your home with this enchanting decoration

Unique Hollow Out Pattern: This snowflake paper fan has a one-of-a-kind hollow out design that not only adds an extra level of sophistication but also creates beautiful reflections on the walls or floor when light shines upon it for an unforgettable visual effect

Boho Christmas Decor: With soft and warm color tones and carefully crafted sizes, this set of snowflake hanging honeycomb fans will add a stylish touch to your home decoration. Each fan features a unique pattern and the perfect mix of warm white, light brown, dark green, and light gray hues.

Versatile Decoration: Hang this snowflake paper fan on your walls, ceilings, or onto your Christmas tree using the rope provided. The high-quality paper material with a silver iron ring center ensures the snowflake shape remains intact while giving you the freedom to place it however you choose

Premium Quality Materials: Made with high-quality 120g adhesive paper, this snowflake decoration is durable, textured, and sturdy enough to last you for many years and Christmases. The classic warm white and dark green hues add sophistication and elegance to your space
